stories.title: Takeaways: Wemby, Spurs close out Thunder
stories.summary: Here's everything we learned from the Spurs-Thunder series.

stories.title: WCF win gets Wemby closer to 'childhood dream'
stories.summary: The Spurs eliminated the defending champion Thunder in Game 7 of the Western Conference finals, a 111-103 victory fueled by center Victor Wembanyama's 22 points and seven rebounds.

stories.title: KO'd by Spurs, OKC says no excuses, 'get better'
stories.summary: The Thunder tipped their cap to the Spurs after a disappointing Game 7 loss and set out to "try to get over the hump" against a team that looms as a long-term roadblock.

stories.title: A's get wrong end of ABS gaffe against Yankees
stories.summary: The ABS system appeared to hit a rare glitch when a pitch to A's catcher Shea Langeliers was confirmed as a strike even though the replay showed it missed the zone by a little less than an inch.

stories.title: Swiatek falls as all French singles champs out
stories.summary: Marta Kostyuk reached the quarterfinals at the French Open for the first time on Sunday by taking out four-time champion Iga Swiatek.
